channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Scores hurt after Iranian missiles hit Israeli desert towns
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iranian missiles injure 180 in towns near Israeli nuclear site
- About 200 injured in Iranian missile strikes near nuclear facility in Israel
- More than 160 people injured following two Iranian missile strikes on southern israel
- Iran claims missile attacks on key Israeli military bases
- Iran has fired 400 missiles at Israel, 92% intercepted since start of war: Israeli military
- Iran missile hit rocks sense of security in Israel nuclear town
- Israeli army says missiles incoming from Iran
- Drone footage shows widespread damage to two Israeli cities after Iranian missile strikes – video
- IRAN UNSTOPPABLE? Iranian missile strikes near Israeli nuclear facility, Tel Aviv; over 160 injured
- At least 15 wounded in Iran’s missile attacks on Tel Aviv — medics
- Iran missile hit rocks sense of security in Israel nuclear town
- Iranian missiles sow panic, destruction in Israeli towns
- Residents of Arad Are Shaken After Direct Strike by Iranian Missile
- Aftermath of Iranian missile strikes near Israel’s nuclear facility
- Residents of Arad Are Shaken After Direct Strike by Iranian Missile
- Iran missiles hit southern Israel, injuring more than 100
- Iran attacks near Israeli nuclear site, fires long-range missiles for first time
- Iran missile strikes wound over 100 in two south Israel towns
- Israeli towns reel from ‘terrifying’ Iranian missile strikes
- Iranian Missiles Sow Panic, Destruction In Israeli Towns
- Heavy damage in southern Israel after Iranian missile strikes
- Iranian missiles sow panic, destruction in Israeli towns
- Iranian missiles sow panic, destruction in Israeli towns
- Huge ‘fireballs’ fall from sky as Iranian missiles target towns near Israeli nuclear research site | Video
- At least 64 injured in southern Israel by Iranian missile
- ‘Never seen anything like this’: Iranian missiles sow panic, destruction in Israeli towns]]>

item.title: Iran says Hormuz open to all but 'enemy-linked' ships amid US threat
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Iran war live: Tehran vows to ‘completely close’ Hormuz if power plants hit
- Iran awaits Trump threat to ‘obliterate’ power plants, readies response
- Iran-Israel war LIVE: Iran awaits Trump threat to blow up power plants
- Iran awaits Trump threat to blow up power plants
- Iran US war LIVE updates: Crude oil prices up again as Trump, Iran trade ultimatums on Strait of Hormuz
- Iran chokes Strait of Hormuz with reported $2M tanker toll, regime threatens global oil supply
- Iran vows to target region’s water and energy infrastructure if US strikes power plants
- Iran says Strait of Hormuz ‘open,’ but ships fear passage
- Strait of Hormuz closed or open? Iran fires back at Trump after latest nuclear warning
- Iran to completely close Hormuz if US targets power plants
- Iran threatens to shut Strait of Hormuz if power plants attacked
- Iran military threatens to completely close Hormuz if US targets power plants
- Iran says will hit region’s energy sites if US, Israel target power plants
- IRGC says it will seal off Hormuz entirely if US attacks power plants
- Iran Will Completely Close Strait of Hormuz If US Attacks Energy Facilities - Headquarters
- Flash: IRGC says to close Hormuz Strait completely if Trump carries out his threat of targeting Iranian energy facilities -- ISNA
- Iran to completely close Hormuz if Trump executes threats on Iranian energy, Revolutionary Guards say
- Iran says will hit region’s energy sites if US, Israel target power plants
- Iran warns regional energy infrastructure will be ‘legitimate targets’ if own facilities hit
- Iran threatens retaliatory strikes on regional energy infrastructure
- Iran says Hormuz open to all but ‘enemy-linked’ ships amid US threat
- Hormuz open to all except ‘enemy-linked’ ships: Iran
- Iran says Hormuz open to all but ‘enemy-linked’ ships amid US threat
- Iran says Hormuz open to all but ‘enemy-linked’ ships amid US threat
- Iran ready to work with IMO on Gulf safety, but Hormuz still closed to 'enemies': Official
- Iran says Hormuz open to all but ‘enemy-linked’ ships amid US threat
- Trump tells Iran it has 48 hours to open Hormuz or US will ‘obliterate’ its power plants
- Trump threatens to "obliterate" Iran's power plants if Strait of Hormuz not opened within 48 hours
- 'Will obliterate power plants...': Trump issues 48 hr ultimatum to Iran over Hormuz; Tehran responds]]>
